# Name: # PhantomRF — minimal 4 MB flash partition table (ESP32-C3 / ESP32-S2)
#   0x310000 - 0x38FFFF : LittleFS (0.5 MB) — compressed web UI only
# 0.5 MB of LittleFS is tight: just enough for a slimmed-down web UI
# recordings or large SSID lists. Use the SD card version of the firmware
# for storage-heavy features. Note ~448 KB at the top of flash is unused
# to keep the partition boundaries aligned to common SPI flash sector sizes.
